title: FX Feed issue on reuters-adapter-sg — Singapore Production
description: P2 alert: FX Feed degradation detected on reuters-adapter-sg in Singapore Production at 14:39 SGT.
root_cause: Reuters RMDS adapter lost TCP connection to primary feed server — no automatic reconnect configured
resolution: Manually restarted Reuters RMDS adapter. Configured automatic reconnect with exponential backoff. Stable after 12 min.

title: SWIFT Queue issue on swift-mq-sg-01 — Singapore Production
description: P3 alert: SWIFT Queue degradation detected on swift-mq-sg-01 in Singapore Production at 22:34 SGT.
root_cause: SWIFT ACK processor deadlocked waiting for a lock held by a message redelivery thread
resolution: Restarted ACK processor — deadlock resolved on restart. Added deadlock detection timeout of 60s to config.

title: Payment Gateway issue on payment-gateway-sg — Singapore Production
description: P2 alert: Payment Gateway degradation detected on payment-gateway-sg in Singapore Production at 14:05 SGT.
root_cause: Rate limiting triggered on the gateway after batch re-submission of 2000 failed transactions within 5 minutes
resolution: Removed rate limit temporarily via gateway admin API. Re-submitted transactions in controlled batches of 100.

title: Payment Gateway issue on visa-adapter-sg — Singapore Production
description: P3 alert: Payment Gateway degradation detected on visa-adapter-sg in Singapore Production at 10:50 SGT.
root_cause: Message queue consumer thread pool starved — payment gateway unable to dequeue settlement confirmations
resolution: Increased consumer thread pool from 20 to 60. Cleared backlog of 1,200 messages. Restored in 18 min.

title: Batch Job issue on eod-reconciliation — Hong Kong Production
description: P2 alert: Batch Job degradation detected on eod-reconciliation in Hong Kong Production at 22:40 SGT.
root_cause: EOD reconciliation batch timed out — source data extract took 3x longer than SLA due to missing index on trade table
resolution: Added missing index on trade_date column in trade table. Re-ran batch — completed in 18 min vs 3-hour timeout.

root_cause: VPC peering route table not updated after subnet expansion — new app nodes unreachable from DB tier
resolution: Updated VPC route table with correct CIDR for new subnets. Verified connectivity from all new app nodes to DB tier.

title: SWIFT Queue issue on swift-ack-processor — Singapore Production
description: P4 alert: SWIFT Queue degradation detected on swift-ack-processor in Singapore Production at 07:10 SGT.
root_cause: SWIFT ACK processor deadlocked waiting for a lock held by a message redelivery thread
resolution: Restarted ACK processor — deadlock resolved on restart. Added deadlock detection timeout of 60s to config.

title: Payment Gateway issue on payment-gateway-sg — Hong Kong Production
description: P3 alert: Payment Gateway degradation detected on payment-gateway-sg in Hong Kong Production at 17:05 SGT.
root_cause: Upstream Visa adapter returned HTTP 503 due to scheduled maintenance window not communicated to NOC
resolution: Engaged Visa adapter support — confirmed maintenance window. Routed traffic to backup gateway-hk. Restored after 35 min.

title: Application Error issue on mobile-banking-api — Hong Kong Production
description: P2 alert: Application Error degradation detected on mobile-banking-api in Hong Kong Production at 18:27 SGT.
root_cause: Teller app dependency on internal pricing service timing out — pricing service circuit breaker not configured
resolution: Configured circuit breaker timeout for pricing service dependency. Added fallback response. Re-deployed mobile API.

title: Auth Service issue on oauth-provider-sg — Singapore Production
description: P3 alert: Auth Service degradation detected on oauth-provider-sg in Singapore Production at 18:58 SGT.
root_cause: MFA service API rate limit hit due to automated login attempts from pentest tooling in prod
resolution: Blocked pentest IP range at firewall. Cleared rate limit counter. Notified security team for post-incident review.

title: Network issue on load-balancer-sg — Hong Kong Production
description: P2 alert: Network degradation detected on load-balancer-sg in Hong Kong Production at 03:49 SGT.
root_cause: BGP route flap on transit link caused 90-second packet loss affecting all prod services in SG region
resolution: BGP route flap self-resolved after 90s. Added BGP flap dampening config to prevent recurrence.

title: Batch Job issue on report-generation-job — Singapore Production
description: P1 alert: Batch Job degradation detected on report-generation-job in Singapore Production at 09:05 SGT.
root_cause: Trade settlement batch failed mid-run — insufficient disk space in /tmp for intermediate sort files
resolution: Cleared /tmp partition (removed old sort files from previous runs). Re-ran batch successfully.

title: FX Feed issue on bloomberg-feed-hk — Hong Kong Production
description: P2 alert: FX Feed degradation detected on bloomberg-feed-hk in Hong Kong Production at 13:21 SGT.
root_cause: Adapter deserialization error caused by unexpected field added to Reuters FIX message schema
resolution: Applied schema update to adapter deserialization config. Restarted adapter. Verified all FX pairs publishing correctly.

title: FX Feed issue on fx-rate-feed-apac — Singapore Production
description: P2 alert: FX Feed degradation detected on fx-rate-feed-apac in Singapore Production at 16:24 SGT.
root_cause: FX rate feed latency exceeded 5s SLA due to network congestion on cross-border Singapore-HK link
resolution: Temporarily rerouted feed via HK-Tokyo link. Engaged network team to resolve SG-HK congestion. Restored in 25 min.

title: Auth Service issue on mfa-service-sg — Hong Kong Production
description: P4 alert: Auth Service degradation detected on mfa-service-sg in Hong Kong Production at 13:12 SGT.
root_cause: OAuth provider certificate mismatch following unplanned infrastructure rotation
resolution: Updated OAuth provider certificate in keystore. Restarted service. Verified token generation functional.

title: Auth Service issue on oauth-provider-sg — Singapore Production
description: P3 alert: Auth Service degradation detected on oauth-provider-sg in Singapore Production at 17:19 SGT.
root_cause: Redis session cache exhausted memory limit causing auth token validation failures
resolution: Flushed expired sessions from Redis. Increased memory limit from 4GB to 8GB. Restarted auth service.

title: SWIFT Queue issue on swift-ack-processor — Hong Kong Production
description: P3 alert: SWIFT Queue degradation detected on swift-ack-processor in Hong Kong Production at 23:37 SGT.
root_cause: Expired SWIFT BIC certificate caused outbound message rejection by correspondent banks
resolution: Renewed SWIFT BIC certificate via SWIFT portal. Restarted outbound message processor. Confirmed ACKs received.

title: Network issue on load-balancer-sg — Hong Kong Production
description: P4 alert: Network degradation detected on load-balancer-sg in Hong Kong Production at 01:14 SGT.
root_cause: Firewall rule change during maintenance window blocked port 5432 (PostgreSQL) — undetected for 22 minutes
resolution: Reverted firewall rule change. Opened port 5432 for app-to-DB communication. Added firewall change review process.

resolution: Batch re-triggered after FX feed restored. Added explicit dependency check on FX feed health before batch start.

title: FX Feed issue on reuters-adapter-sg — Singapore Production
description: P1 alert: FX Feed degradation detected on reuters-adapter-sg in Singapore Production at 15:14 SGT.
root_cause: Reuters RMDS adapter lost TCP connection to primary feed server — no automatic reconnect configured
resolution: Manually restarted Reuters RMDS adapter. Configured automatic reconnect with exponential backoff. Stable after 12 min.

title: SWIFT Queue issue on swift-gateway-sg — Singapore Production
description: P2 alert: SWIFT Queue degradation detected on swift-gateway-sg in Singapore Production at 15:07 SGT.
root_cause: SWIFT MQ broker ran out of disk space — message persistence log filled /var/mqm partition to 100%
resolution: Cleared old message persistence logs from /var/mqm (freed 80GB). Restarted MQ broker. Processed 1,400 queued messages.

root_cause: SSL certificate expiry on payment-gateway-sg caused TLS handshake failures for all downstream consumers
resolution: Renewed SSL certificate via automation pipeline. Restarted gateway service. Verified TLS handshake successful.

title: Payment Gateway issue on payment-gateway-sg — Hong Kong Production
description: P2 alert: Payment Gateway degradation detected on payment-gateway-sg in Hong Kong Production at 07:23 SGT.

resolution: Increased consumer thread pool from 20 to 60. Cleared backlog of 1,200 messages. Restored in 18 min.
